meta.title: CPaaS — Programmable Communication via API
meta.description: Integrate WhatsApp, SMS, RCS and voice directly into your system with Solvefy's communication API. High availability and scale for your business.

hero.title: Communicate at scale and create <accent>real-time connections</accent>
hero.subtitle: The transactional heart of the ecosystem. A robust API-based communication platform built for companies that demand high-volume messaging. It also powers our other solutions (such as Solvefy Marketing).

history.title: Born as telecom, evolved into <accent>CPaaS</accent>.
history.subtitle: We've been in the communications market for two decades; that's why we deliver our own routes, BRL billing and human support in Portuguese and English, with the stability of those who have seen the market change many times.
history.callout: The only CPaaS solution natively integrated with Marketing, Ads and CRM. A robust ecosystem with simplified, unified access.

nativeOperator.title: Native Operator
nativeOperator.desc: We operate end-to-end infrastructure with our own routes and direct connection to every carrier.

directRoutes.title: Direct Routes
directRoutes.desc: Direct connection to Brazil's major carriers for maximum deliverability.

humanSupport.title: Human Support
humanSupport.desc: 100% human support, in Portuguese and English, with real SLAs for critical operations.

brlBilling.title: BRL Billing
brlBilling.desc: No FX swings. Contract and invoice in Brazilian Reais, with total predictability.

channelFlow.title: Connect your system to <accent>your customers</accent>
channelFlow.subtitle: Via API or web interface, manage every communication channel with efficiency and scale.

rcs.label: RCS
rcs.description: Meet SMS 2.0: richer, more engaging and more profitable

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Count on the favorite channel for B2B sales

email.label: Email
email.description: Build complete journeys with practicality and automation

agencias.label: Marketing Agencies
agencias.c1d: Delight with images, videos and interactive buttons directly in the native inbox.
agencias.c2d: Use WhatsApp chatbots to capture data and qualify contacts automatically.
agencias.c3d: Create cadenced message flows to warm up leads to the moment of conversion.

bets.label: Betting
bets.c1d: Send must-have odds variations straight to the bettor's phone.
bets.c2d: Build trust and loyalty by instantly notifying that the money has landed.
bets.c3d: Validate identity and protect transactions with high-deliverability temporary passwords.

ecommerce.label: E-commerce
ecommerce.c1d: Send automatic messages with irresistible offers minutes after abandonment.
ecommerce.c2d: Keep the customer at ease with real-time updates, from dispatch to doorstep.
ecommerce.c3d: Reduce customer anxiety with instant receipts via WhatsApp or SMS.

educacao.label: Education
educacao.c1d: Make renewal easier with payment links and due-date alerts via WhatsApp.
educacao.c2d: Keep student engagement high with automatic reminders of the academic calendar.
educacao.c3d: Send newsletters, meeting invitations and urgent announcements in a centralized way.

igaming.label: iGaming
igaming.c1d: Incentivize new deposits with real-time bonus and free-spin alerts.
igaming.c2d: Notify players minutes before events start to drive live betting.
igaming.c3d: Bring inactive users back with exclusive offers via SMS or WhatsApp.

saas.label: SaaS
saas.c1d: Reduce churn by sending usage tips and tutorials during the first days of subscription.
saas.c2d: Prevent delinquency with friendly reminders and direct payment links.
saas.c3d: Offer plan upgrades exactly when the customer hits the usage limit.

saude.label: Healthcare
saude.c1d: Wipe out no-shows with interactive reminders where the patient confirms or reschedules.
saude.c2d: Build loyalty with automatic invitations for annual preventive check-ups.
saude.c3d: Send secure links via SMS or WhatsApp so patients can access reports from home.

tech.label: Tech
tech.c1d: Notify your team and users about instability in seconds via critical-route SMS.
tech.c2d: Shield access to your platforms with the fastest and most stable OTP API on the market.
tech.c3d: Announce new features and release notes directly where users engage the most.

varejo.label: Retail
varejo.c1d: Trigger hyper-targeted campaigns based on the customer's purchase history.
varejo.c2d: Automatically notify customers when that desired product is back on the shelf.
varejo.c3d: Collect valuable feedback via high-response-rate channels right after the purchase.

security.title: Compliance <accent>from data to dispatch</accent>.
security.subtitle: Infrastructure designed to operate in Brazil, under the Brazilian legal framework.

lgpd.title: Native LGPD
lgpd.desc: Hosting in Brazil, operator agreements and auditable processes compliant with LGPD.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.desc: Sensitive traffic and data encrypted in transit and at rest.

consent.title: Consent Management
consent.desc: Opt-in, opt-out and consent history natively integrated in every channel.

pricing.title: Pricing that <accent>fits your operation</accent>.
pricing.subtitle: From the first broadcast to Enterprise volumes, no fine print.

plan.title: Enterprise
plan.desc: Modern communication demands flexibility and speed. With SolvefyCPaaS, you connect your system to your customers' favorite channels through robust, easy-to-implement APIs. No more rigid solutions: build the ideal journey for your business model.
plan.footer: Integrate WhatsApp, SMS, Voice and Email APIs directly into your software and scale your interactions easily.
